productDisplayName: Clarks Men Black Stroll Over Casual Shoes
description: Crafted from the finest leather, this loafer from clarks is designed to offer comfort at its best, without compromising on style. Packed with features that offer luxurious comfort, this pair makes you look your executive best when paired with formals and classy accessories. Upper Leather upper with an elongated tongue Mildly padded collar Padded footbed with an extra-cushioned heel for shock absorption and all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with waffle patterned lugs on the forefoot and back heel for enhanced grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner if needed Do not store in direct sunlight
